siteSettings.title: Pet Share
siteSettings.description: A satirical pet-sharing marketplace for people who need a very temporary break.

defaultSeo.title: Pet Share
defaultSeo.description: Temporary pets, questionable peace of mind.

seo.title: Pet Share | Temporary Pets
seo.description: A bright, friendly, deeply unserious marketplace for temporary pet relief.

heroCarousel.headline: Has your dog thrown up in the bed recently?
heroCarousel.body: Lend him out for a couple days. Someone else deserves character development.

heroCarousel.headline: Is the cat enforcing snack law again?
heroCarousel.body: List the tiny supervisor for a short stay. Another household can learn what the card means.

heroCarousel.headline: Has your couch started flinching?
heroCarousel.body: Send the problem on a tiny vacation. You get silence; they get enrichment.

heroCarousel.headline: Want pet energy without pet consequences?
heroCarousel.body: Take one home for a bit, collect the memories, then return the mess to its rightful owner.

heroCarousel.headline: Is your pet judging your plants again?
heroCarousel.body: Let someone else host the inspection. Their fern could probably use the feedback.

contentSections.title: A cleaner way to share the responsibility
contentSections.description: Owners create a listing, seekers send an inquiry, and everyone agrees on pickup, care notes, and the exact moment the responsibility comes back home.

contentSections.headline: All the pet stories. None of the long-term lint.
contentSections.body: Host the walk, the photos, and the oddly specific personality for a little while. Then return the leash, the mystery noise, and the responsibility to its rightful home.

seo.title: Pets Near You | Pet Share
seo.description: Find temporary companions with permanent opinions.

hero.headline: Find pets near you.
hero.body: Find a temporary roommate with strong opinions.

petIndexPage.filterIntro: Narrow the field by species, mess risk, cuddle policy, and other warning signs.

contentSections.headline: Still deciding?
contentSections.body: That is reasonable. Some of these pets come with instructions.

systemPageNotFound.headline: This pet has slipped its collar.
systemPageNotFound.message: The page you are looking for wandered off before we could attach the tiny bell. Try the pet listings or head home.

systemPageServerError.headline: Something chewed through the server cable.
systemPageServerError.message: Pet Share hit a problem while fetching the good stuff. Try again in a moment or check the listings that are behaving for now.
systemPageServerError.supportCopy: If this keeps happening, the master inbox can receive a polite report.

systemPageGenericError.headline: The pets knocked something over.

marketingPages.title: About
marketingPages.summary: The questionably proud history of sharing pets with people who have not read the fine print.

seo.title: About | Pet Share
seo.description: Learn about the marketplace behind temporary pet relief.

hero.headline: Built for owners who need one quiet afternoon.
hero.body: Pet Share helps overwhelmed owners arrange short pet handoffs with clear care notes, honest warnings, and highly specific disclaimers.

sections.headline: Our deeply questionable origin
sections.body: The idea began when one overwhelmed owner asked whether anyone else wanted to host a dog with excellent eyebrows and questionable timing.

sections.label: Emergency towels deployed
sections.supportingText: None of them asked for this.

marketingPages.title: Process
marketingPages.summary: How temporary pet relief becomes somebody else's short-term problem.

seo.title: Process | Pet Share
seo.description: Learn how Pet Share's temporary pet stay process works.

hero.headline: How Pet Share works.
hero.body: Two paths, one shared goal: short-term pet relief with clear expectations, honest care notes, and return times everyone can survive.

sections.headline: For owners who need the house to stop making pet noises
sections.body: Create an account, list your pet, review inquiries, and arrange a temporary stay with someone who has read the care notes on purpose.

sections.title: Create your account
sections.description: Set up a simple profile so your pet listing has a real contact point and the handoff does not begin with five mysterious text messages.

sections.title: Add the pet details
sections.description: Upload photos, write the honest version of the personality notes, and include the habits people should know before they agree to temporary custody.

sections.title: Review incoming requests
sections.description: Read the inquiry, decide whether the seeker sounds prepared, and agree on timing, supplies, and any sentence they must never say in front of the pet.

sections.title: Send them off temporarily
sections.description: Pack the food, care notes, comfort item, and one final warning that sounds dramatic until approximately day two.

sections.headline: For people seeking a short-term companion
sections.body: Find pets near you, submit an inquiry, pick up your temporary roommate, and return them before they become part of your household mythology.

sections.title: Find an animal you like
sections.description: Filter by pet type, mess risk, energy, and cuddle policy until you find the right amount of temporary responsibility.

sections.title: Submit an inquiry
sections.description: Tell the owner why you are prepared, when you are available, and whether your home can handle the listed care notes without improvising.

sections.title: Pick up at the agreed time
sections.description: Meet the owner, confirm the routine, collect the supplies, and ask every practical question before the pet is watching you make decisions.

sections.title: Return on schedule
sections.description: Bring the pet, supplies, and any newly discovered lore back at the agreed time. You keep the story; the owner gets the responsibility back.

marketingPages.title: Pricing
marketingPages.summary: Simple listing plans for owners. Hosting a temporary pet stays free.

seo.title: Pricing | Pet Share
seo.description: Compare Pet Share listing plans for owners who want to lend out their pets temporarily.

hero.headline: List your pet. Let someone else host the personality.
hero.body: Pet Share is free for temporary hosts. Owners pay only when they want to list a pet and invite carefully optimistic strangers into the care-note ecosystem.

sections.headline: Hosting is free. The lint is between you and your furniture.
sections.body: People seeking a short-term companion can inquire at no cost. The listing plans below are for owners who want their pet seen, understood, and temporarily appreciated by someone else.

features.label: Pet profile listing
features.note: Name, breed, care notes, and a dignified amount of honesty.

features.label: Up to 6 photos
features.note: Enough angles to prove the pet is real and judging.

features.label: Inquiry forwarding
features.note: Requests route to the master inbox for phase one.

features.label: Featured placement
features.note: Your pet waits politely in the regular listings.

features.label: Up to 10 photos
features.note: Includes the flattering one and the legally informative one.

features.label: Priority listing rotation
features.note: More chances to be seen by brave nearby hosts.

features.label: Care-note review
features.note: We help make the warnings sound useful, not like a haunted voicemail.

features.label: Homepage feature eligibility
features.note: For pets with strong photos and a compelling incident history.

features.label: Owner profile polish
features.note: We make you sound calm, prepared, and only reasonably tired.

features.label: Relisting reminder
features.note: A polite nudge before the pet reclaims the hallway.

header.headline: Listing plan comparison
header.body: A practical chart for owners deciding how loudly their pet should be announced to the neighbourhood.

rows.description: How long the pet remains publicly available for temporary hosting inquiries.
Enough evidence for hosts to understand scale, fluff, and possible couch impact.
How often the pet gets nudged toward people who might temporarily appreciate them.
A second look at the instructions before a stranger learns the hard way.
A gentle prompt before the pet resumes full-time household management.
How much help the listing gets sounding official enough for a pet with no respect for doors.

values.note: Reads like a tiny municipal hearing

rows.description: A public-facing hint that soft household objects may be entering negotiations.

sections.headline: Ready to give your pet a short public relations tour?
sections.body: Start with the listing details. You can decide how much spotlight the tiny roommate deserves once the photos and care notes are in order.

marketingPages.title: Contact
marketingPages.summary: A friendly way to reach the Pet Share desk without mailing physical evidence.

seo.title: Contact | Pet Share
seo.description: Contact Pet Share with general questions, listing questions, or messages best handled before a pet learns about them.

hero.headline: Contact the Pet Share desk.
hero.body: Questions, listing help, suspiciously specific pet concerns, and messages that do not yet require the warranty clipboard can start here.

sections.headline: What to send us
sections.body: Use the contact form for general questions, listing support, account questions, press inquiries, or any message that can be answered without measuring bite marks. If your message involves a dramatic incident, a rug with a backstory, or snack-related damages, the warranty page is probably the more official-looking place to start.

sections.headline: Response expectations
sections.body: Messages go to the Pet Share master inbox. We try to answer practical questions first, then the ones written entirely in capital letters by someone who has just discovered a pet in the laundry basket.

marketingPages.title: Warranty
marketingPages.summary: A very official desk for deeply unofficial pet-related claims.

seo.title: Warranty | Pet Share
seo.description: File a highly official Pet Share warranty claim for suspicious cuteness, snack pressure, and other temporary pet conditions.

hero.headline: File a claim with the warranty desk.
hero.body: For incidents involving suspicious cuteness, snack coercion, rug-based negotiations, and other temporary pet side effects.

sections.headline: Please do not mail us the evidence
sections.body: The warranty desk accepts photos, descriptions, timestamps, and reasonable emotional testimony. We do not accept loose fur in envelopes, suspicious socks in padded mailers, damp chew toys, or anything described by the courier as making eye contact.

sections.headline: Limited temporary companion warranty notice
sections.body: By hosting, admiring, transporting, photographing, snack-negotiating with, or otherwise becoming emotionally compromised by a listed pet, you acknowledge that Pet Share is not responsible for uncontrolled cute aggression, spontaneous baby voice, the purchase of premium treats outside your stated budget, or treat spending habits that exceed the national average. Pet Share further disclaims liability for guests who rearrange your household hierarchy, occupy warm laundry without written authorization, stare at you like a Victorian creditor, develop a favorite chair through adverse possession, or make you say the phrase "just one more photo" more than seven times in a calendar hour. Claims involving chewed slippers, rearranged cushions, dramatic hallway galloping, unplanned nicknames, snack debt, and emotional damages caused by returning a pet on schedule will be reviewed by the warranty desk with great concern and very little legal standing. Nothing on this page should be interpreted as a promise that the pet will respect your flooring, your personal space, your houseplants, your keyboard, or the quiet optimism you had before pickup. Additional exclusions include, but are not limited to, sofa negotiations conducted entirely through eye contact, unauthorized blanket tunneling, surprise affection delivered while you are holding hot coffee, and the sudden realization that your home has always lacked a small creature judging the hallway. Pet Share does not warrant that a temporary companion will arrive with reasonable opinions, depart with all of your socks accounted for, or refrain from becoming the subject of a group chat within fifteen minutes of pickup. Any claim alleging excessive charm, suspicious compliance before mischief, snack-based lobbying, or the creation of a new household nickname shall be treated as evidence that the system is functioning approximately as designed. By filing this claim, you further confirm that you understand the warranty desk cannot refund dignity lost during baby talk, reimburse throw pillows placed in morally compromised positions, or reverse the emotional consequence of returning a pet who briefly made your living room feel like it had better management.

sections.headline: Still convinced this was not standard pet behavior?
sections.body: Submit the form and the warranty desk will route your claim to the appropriate imaginary department, where it will be handled with the procedural gravity of a clipboard wearing a tiny tie.
